title: rubus × argutifolius f. ciliatus
intro: Rubus × argutifolius f. ciliatus, also known as a hybrid of the raspberry species, is a plant with thorny stems and edible fruit, native to parts of Europe. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its use in traditional herbal medicine. The health benefits of Rubus × argutifolius f. ciliatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
